title: A joint resolution providing for congressional disapproval under chapter 8 of title 5, United States Code, of the rule submitted by the Environmental Protection Agency relating to "Control of Air Pollution From New Motor Vehicles: Heavy-Duty Engine and Vehicle Standards".
crs_summary: This joint resolution nullifies the Environmental Protection Agency rule relating to Control of Air Pollution From New Motor Vehicles: Heavy-Duty Engine and Vehicle Standards (88 Fed. Reg. 4296) and published on January 24, 2023. The rule modifies emission standards to reduce air pollution, including ozone and particulate matter, from heavy-duty engines and vehicles.
bill_text:
[Congressional Bills 118th Congress]
[From the U.S. Government Publishing Office]
[S.J. Res. 11 Engrossed in Senate (ES)]

<DOC>
118th CONGRESS
 1st Session
S. J. RES. 11

_______________________________________________________________________

 JOINT RESOLUTION

 Providing for congressional disapproval under chapter 8 of title 5, 
 United States Code, of the rule submitted by the Environmental 
Protection Agency relating to ``Control of Air Pollution From New Motor 
 Vehicles: Heavy-Duty Engine and Vehicle Standards''.

 Resolved by the Senate and House of Representatives of the United 
States of America in Congress assembled, That Congress disapproves the 
rule submitted by the Administrator of the Environmental Protection 
Agency relating to ``Control of Air Pollution From New Motor Vehicles: 
Heavy-Duty Engine and Vehicle Standards'' (88 Fed. Reg. 4296 (January 
24, 2023)), and such rule shall have no force or effect.

 Passed the Senate April 26, 2023.

 Attest:

 Secretary.
118th CONGRESS

 1st Session

 S. J. RES. 11

_______________________________________________________________________

 JOINT RESOLUTION

 Providing for congressional disapproval under chapter 8 of title 5, 
 United States Code, of the rule submitted by the Environmental 
Protection Agency relating to ``Control of Air Pollution From New Motor 
 Vehicles: Heavy-Duty Engine and Vehicle Standards''.
